title: Italian Options Satin Ribbon, Fabric Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Crafting, Balloons, Wedding Car, Presents, Cake, Christmas, Birthday, Gift Wrap Accessories, 25mm Wide x 25 Metre Roll, Hot Pink
features: PREMIUM QUALITY: Available in over 40 rich colours, including classic pink, black, gold, blue, white, green, and red, and in multiple sizes, our premium satin ribbons are made from 100% polyester, ideal for crafting, decorating, and gift-wrapping.
SMOOTH TEXTURE: Super soft and smooth, with a beautiful texture and natural sheen, these non-fraying, double-faced ribbons for crafting add a polished finish to any project.

COLOURFAST MATERIAL: This satin fabric ribbon is ideal for hair accessories, toys, appliqué, and clothing. Colourfast and machine washable, it helps keep your crafts clean and colours vibrant. Also suitable for dry cleaning.

VERSATILE CRAFTS: Sturdy and easy to work with, this versatile gift wrap ribbon is perfect for crafts, card making, bouquets, cakes, balloons, bows, and sewing. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified for safety and quality.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: From the manufacturer Italian Options Satin Ribbon Bows Self Adhesive 12-Piece Pack, 5 cm Bow Width...
